conservative.name: Good Witch Hunter
conservative.requirements: Target can see and hear you, ally has recently performed an Intimidate check

success.description: You act sympathetically towards the target, being both supportive and understanding. Influence the target
As above, and an ally adds to the next Intimidate check against the target

bane.description: Move the party tension meter 1 space to the right

chaosStar.description: You are a little too supportive. Your target gains the Inspired condition while this card is recharging

sigmarsComet.description: Your target gains the Perplexed condition while this card is recharging

reckless.name: Bad Witch Hunter
reckless.requirements: Target can see and hear you, ally has recently performed a Charm check

success.description: You act aggressively towards the target making blatant accusations and threats. Influence the target
As above, and an ally adds to the next Charm check against the target

bane.description: Move the party tension meter 1 space to the right

chaosStar.description: You are a little too aggressive. Suffer 2 fatigue

sigmarsComet.description: Your target gains the Perplexed condition while this card is recharging
